data.content:
This is an MSTest project using `[TestCategory]` attributes. To run only the Integration tests:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will match the 3 tests tagged `[TestCategory("Integration")]`:
- `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`
- `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`
- `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`
